chapter_question: How do the first act exercises become reproducible curvature labs?
inspection_targets: A finite difference becomes a derivative through an inspectable limit.
Rational points on a circle encode Euclidean triples.
Spherical excess is counted face by face.
Exercise themes become construct, measure, compare, perturb labs.

source_span.focus: Practice set reinforcing ultimate equality, non-Euclidean geometry, and first curvature measurements.
source_span.label: Chapter 03
source_span.title: Exercises for Prologue and Act I
topics: Estimating Gaussian curvature from intrinsic data
Comparisons of angular excess across surfaces
